dashboard.heroTitle: Speak naturally, write perfectly — in any app
dashboard.heroSubtitle: Press {hotkey} to start and stop voice input. Or hold to say something brief.
dashboard.noRecent: Your recent transcriptions will show here
dashboard.starDesc: If OpenType helps you, please give us a Star on GitHub to show your support.
dashboard.contributeDesc: Submit an Issue or Pull Request — let's make OpenType better together.
dashboard.permAccessibilityNeeded: Accessibility permission needed for reading selected text
dashboard.permScreenNeeded: Screen recording permission needed for OCR — grant to your terminal app, then restart

dictionary.title: Personal Dictionary
dictionary.addPlaceholder: Add terms (comma-separated, e.g. Kubernetes, gRPC, OpenType)
dictionary.noTermsHint: Words here help the AI spell domain-specific vocabulary correctly

recording.errorApiKeyDetail: Please configure your API key in Settings → API Providers.
recording.errorNoModelDetail: Please select a model in Settings → API Providers.
recording.errorNoSpeechDetail: We didn't hear anything. Please try again and speak clearly.
recording.errorTimeoutDetail: The API took too long to respond. Please try again.
recording.errorBusyDetail: Please wait for the current transcription to finish.
recording.errorAuthDetail: Your API key may be invalid or expired. Please check it in Settings.
recording.errorRateLimitDetail: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
recording.errorServerDetail: The API service is temporarily down. Please try again later.

providers.description: Configure API providers for speech recognition, language processing, and screen analysis.
providers.providerDesc: The API service to use for this capability
providers.apiKeyDesc: Your secret key from the provider's dashboard
providers.baseUrlDesc: Custom API endpoint. Only change if using a proxy or self-hosted service.
providers.sttModelDesc: The speech recognition model. Larger models are more accurate but slower.
providers.llmModelDesc: Text-only model for polishing transcriptions, removing fillers, and adjusting tone.
providers.vlmModelDesc: Accepts image + text input, used for understanding screen content.
providers.sttTooltip: Converts your voice into raw text. This is the first step — choose a provider that supports your language.
providers.llmTooltip: Polishes transcriptions, removes fillers, applies tone rules, and powers screen context understanding (VLM).

general.description: Appearance, startup behavior, and input/output preferences.
general.launchDesc: Automatically start OpenType when you log in
general.toggle: Toggle (press to start / press to stop)
general.inputModeHint: Toggle mode: press hotkey once to start, once to stop. Push-to-Talk: hold the key to record.
general.soundEnabledDesc: Play a beep when recording starts and stops.
general.alsoWriteClipboardDesc: After typing at cursor, also copy the result to clipboard.

hotkey.description: Click on a field and press your desired key combination to set a shortcut.
hotkey.pushToTalkHint: Hold this key to record (only in push-to-talk mode)
hotkey.pasteLastHint: Quickly paste the most recent transcription result

audio.micHint: Select your preferred microphone. Leave empty to use the system default.

tones.description: Control the writing style of your dictation output. Set a default tone for all apps, or add rules so specific apps get a different style automatically.
tones.defaultToneDesc: The writing style used when no app-specific rule matches
tones.appRulesDesc: When dictating in a matched app, the tone switches automatically.
tones.noRules: No rules yet. Add one below to customize tone per app.

language.uiLanguageHint: Choose the language for the application interface

privacy.privacyDesc: OpenType stores all dictation history locally on your device. Audio is processed via API calls but is never stored by the service providers. We do not use your data to train any models.
privacy.saveHistoryDesc: When enabled, all transcriptions are saved locally for review
privacy.retentionHint: Older entries are automatically removed based on this setting
privacy.clearAllHint: Deletes all history, personal dictionary entries, and learned preferences from this device.
privacy.clearConfirm: Clear all local data? This cannot be undone.

advanced.description: Fine-tune the AI post-processing pipeline. Each feature can be individually enabled or disabled.
advanced.llmPostProcessingDesc: Use LLM to polish STT output (remove fillers, fix errors, add punctuation). When off, raw STT text is used directly.
advanced.fillerDesc: Automatically remove "um", "uh", "like", "you know", "那个", "嗯" and other meaningless fillers
advanced.repetitionDesc: Detect and remove unintentional word/phrase repetitions (e.g., "I I want" → "I want")
advanced.selfCorrectionDesc: Recognize mid-sentence corrections (e.g., "Monday—no, Tuesday") and keep only the final intent
advanced.autoFormatDesc: Add punctuation, capitalization, and organize spoken lists into structured text

context.description: Context awareness helps OpenType understand what you're working on for better transcription results.
context.activeWindowDesc: Detect the active app (e.g. Slack, VS Code) and automatically match the writing tone to the context
context.selectedTextDesc: Read selected text, field content, and cursor position to help the AI understand what you're editing. Requires accessibility permission.
context.screenOcrDesc: Capture your screen and use a vision model (VLM) to understand what you're working on. Requires screen recording permission and a VLM model configured in provider settings.
context.accessibilityNeeded: Accessibility permission required — click to grant
context.screenNeeded: Screen recording permission required — click to open settings
context.autoLearnDesc: Detect proper nouns, brand names, and technical terms from transcriptions and add them to your dictionary automatically

update.availableDesc: A new version is ready to download.
